infographic.label: Infographic
infographic.blurb: A complex data/AI concept, explained in one image.

chart.label: Chart
chart.blurb: One chart, one idea - single-chart experiments, d3.js spirit. Never a dashboard.

data-portrait.label: Data portrait
data-portrait.blurb: One number or stat as the hero - the two-second rule made visible.

diagram.label: Diagram
diagram.blurb: A system, pipeline, or architecture drawn as designed art, not a boxes-and-arrows dump.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.blurb: How a concept, tech, or idea evolved - time as the spine.

map.label: Map
map.blurb: A concept as territory - a landscape or transit-map of an idea space.

matrix.label: Matrix
matrix.blurb: A 2x2 or quadrant framework - a decision or trade-off made spatial.

isotype.label: Isotype
isotype.blurb: Quantity shown by repeating identical pictograms - more units, never a bigger icon.

annotated.label: Annotated
annotated.blurb: A chart, screenshot, or artifact with labels pointing straight at the meaning.

field-guide.label: Field guide
field-guide.blurb: A naturalist plate cataloguing the "species" of a data/AI thing.

comic.label: Comic
comic.blurb: Strips that teach a real lesson.

poster.label: Poster
poster.blurb: One bold visual metaphor for a data/AI idea.

typographic.label: Typographic
typographic.blurb: Type IS the image - words as the whole composition.

carousel.label: Carousel
carousel.blurb: Multi-slide explainers for concepts that need pacing.

zine.label: Zine
zine.blurb: An editorial spread or mini-page - print-craft applied to one idea.

card.label: Card
card.blurb: A compact shareable image with one sharp idea.

cheatsheet.label: Cheatsheet
cheatsheet.blurb: One page, 80% of what matters - a topic distilled and designed to keep.

ironic-graph.label: Ironic graph
ironic-graph.blurb: Charts that tell the truth by exaggerating it.

illustration.label: Illustration
illustration.blurb: Data and AI ideas as scenes and characters.

logo.label: Logo
logo.blurb: Marks and identity for data/AI things.

style-study.label: Style study
style-study.blurb: The sketchbook - mimicking a beautiful style to learn it.

works.title: The AI landscape
works.concept: The field of AI drawn as a metro - six lines you can trace end to end, with interchange stations marking exactly where two disciplines share an idea.
works.prompt:
DESIGN-BUILT (not prompted) - hand-authored SVG, rendered headless.
STYLE: transit map, Vignelli discipline - cream ground, one bold colour per line, uniform station dots, stadium interchange markers, 45/90 geometry, Helvetica.
LINES: Machine Learning · Deep Learning · Language · Vision · Generative & Agents · Data & MLOps (the full-width foundation everything rides on).
INTERCHANGES (where fields connect): Neural Networks = ML + Deep Learning · Embeddings = Deep Learning + Language · Transformers = Language + Vision + Generative.
Full editable SVG source is published alongside this work as sheet.html.
works.takeaway: The whole field is one connected network - and the breakthroughs happen at the interchanges (embeddings, transformers), all riding on data. Most people never leave their home station.

works.title: RAG vs Fine-tuning vs Prompt-tuning
works.prompt: Blueprint Ledger style-DNA - deep blueprint indigo (#1f3a5f) on warm paper, Georgia display + mono spec labels, thin ruled hairlines. Hero: four LLM levers as blueprint line-art (prompt box, RAG retrieval circle, fine-tune dial, soft-prompt vectors). Rendered SVG, not diffusion.
works.takeaway: Fine-tuning teaches a skill; RAG supplies facts. Default to prompt + RAG - fine-tune only the pipelines that prove they need it.

works.title: The minds of modern AI
works.concept: Modern AI emerged when learning ideas met data, compute, and engineering—but its pioneers still disagree about the road to human-level intelligence.
works.prompt: Portrait storybook editorial infographic titled “THE MINDS OF MODERN AI,” using an airy cream paper background, watercolor-and-gouache textures, delicate ink outlines, light pastel colors, and a winding golden path through four chapters: “1 · BREAKTHROUGHS” showing Bengio, Dally, Hinton, Huang, Li, and LeCun with their core contributions; “2 · AI BUBBLE?” contrasting real value today with the limits of the current paradigm; “3 · HUMAN-LEVEL AI” presenting six divergent views through signposts and an airplane-and-bird metaphor; and “4 · THE SHARED LESSON” ending in a collaborative human-and-machine library-city with the banners “BUILD USEFUL SYSTEMS,” “EXPLORE BEYOND LANGUAGE,” and “GOVERN BEFORE ACCELERATION.” Premium, vivid, optimistic, intellectually serious, readable, no logos, no watermark, no dark cyberpunk, no corporate stock-art look.
works.takeaway: AI's practical value is already real; what remains uncertain is whether scale, new paradigms, or human-machine collaboration defines the road ahead.

works.title: The forecast, quarterly (sample - replace with real work)
works.concept: Forecast uncertainty and presentation bias in business planning.
works.prompt: three panel minimalist comic: panel 1 a jagged line going down, panel 2 a flat wobbly line, panel 3 the same line drawn straight up by hand with a sun in the corner, flat colors
works.takeaway: Forecasts bend toward whoever presents last.

works.title: Half-truth dashboard mark (sample - replace with real work)
works.concept: Metric framing: every dashboard reveals some truth and hides some context.
works.prompt: logo mark for a fictional analytics startup called Half Truth: a circle half filled, half outline, single accent dot, bauhaus minimal, plum ink peach
works.takeaway: Every dashboard shows half the truth. Good design admits which half.

works.title: Lake or swamp (sample - replace with real work)
works.concept: Data governance: ownership, quality, and stewardship decide whether a lake becomes useful or stagnant.
works.prompt: minimal geometric poster of a lake made of concentric rings slowly turning into a swamp, flat vector, plum and peach on dark ink, editorial illustration --ar 4:5
works.takeaway: A data lake without ownership is just a swamp with better marketing.
